title: Glass bridge GET /sessions/:id/snapshot — bounded-era (F-04 closed)
description: Subset of the HTTP JSON response shape for static/bounded snapshots. Live WS deltas and live backlog semantics are out of scope. See docs/PHASE0_FREEZE_TRACKER.md (Closed F-04) and docs/F03_F04_FREEZE_PROPOSAL.md.

snapshot_cursor.description: Opaque bounded-era cursor (v0:empty | v0:off:0 | v0:off:N). Clients must not treat as a live delta offset. When value is v0:empty, disambiguate using bounded_snapshot.snapshot_origin.

live_session_ingest.description: Remains false until live ingest is implemented.

resync_hint.description: Null/absent means no extra bounded-era warning — not live-safe or continuity-safe.

snapshot_origin.description: Collector feed path. Required to disambiguate v0:empty cursor (unknown vs empty per-RPC poll).

reason.description: Frozen bounded-era tokens; single source in Rust: glass_bridge::resync::RESYNC_HINT_REASON_*
